basic_details.job_title: NHSRC Junior Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Health Systems Resource Centre (NHSRC) Junior Consultant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website NHSRC . A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the NHSRC Junior Consultant Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 55 years of age who have Bachelor’s Degree in Science with Master’s Degree/Diploma in Public Health OR Bachelor’s Degree in Commerce with Master’s Degree/Diploma in Business Administration/Commerce/Health Financing along with relevant experience are eligible to apply for these Junior Consultant vacancies. The online application process for NHSRC Juni

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree in Science with Master's Degree / Diploma in Public Health, Bachelor's Degree in Commerce with Master's Degree / Diploma in Business Administration / Commerce
qualification.details: Bachelor's Degree in Science with Master's Degree/Diploma in Public Health OR Bachelor's Degree in Commerce with Master's Degree/Diploma in Business Administration/Commerce/Health Financing. At least 5 years post-qualification experience in health sector financing data, budgets & accounts. Proficiency in MS Office, SAS, data analysis. Experience in public health, monitoring & evaluation.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NHSRC Junior Consultant Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 01-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NHSRC to complete the application.
